hooks.command: bash -c 'set -o pipefail; if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE "chapters[/\\\\].*\.md$"; then python scripts/scan-text.py "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>&1 | tail -80; fi'

bash -c 'set -o pipefail; if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE "(state|outline|characters|config|locations)[/\\\\].*\.(yaml|md)$"; then python scripts/check-schema.py "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>&1 | tail -40; fi'
hooks.description: Auto-validate YAML schema after writing state/outline/character/config/location files
Run consistency check before session ends
Run full schema validation before session ends
